Mechatronics Engineering

Our Mission

MENU

The aim of the Department of Mechatronics Engineering, where electronics, computer and mechanical sciences, which constitute the main structure of today's technology, are presented together, is to train researcher engineers who push the limits of competition at the international level to the limit, have strong professional ethics, protect human values, are equipped with theoretical and practical knowledge at a level that can follow the latest technologies and requirements in the field and update their knowledge, and thus bring permanent and creative solutions to problems, have analytical thinking, problem solving and modelling skills.

In order to become an internationally leading higher education institution in the field of mechatronics technologies, one of the biggest goals of our university is to become a science centre that shapes the technology of the future by creating a base in the synthesis of universal science and modern education, researching, discovering and producing new knowledge and technologies with its academic staff as well as the engineers it trains.

Mission

The mission of the Department of Mechatronics Engineering is to educate engineers who are creative, committed to ethical values, solution-oriented, and capable of developing sustainable technologies; to conduct scientific research supported by academic expertise and industry collaborations; and to generate value-added solutions that are responsive to societal needs.

Vision

The vision of the Department of Mechatronics Engineering is to become a globally recognized and distinguished department that, through its interdisciplinary approach, produces innovative technologies and stands as a preferred center of excellence in mechatronics engineering.
